caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the chest, a black baseball cap with a gold logo, a gold chain with a pendant, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features white walls adorned with yellow stars and text that reads "BOSS HUSTLE." On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a similar logo on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101." As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and gesturing, moving his head slightly and shifting his expression while remaining in the same position. A monitor is partially visible in the upper right background. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene as the man continues his conversation.
